# Out-of-Vault Path Reference Fixture

This file is a bats test fixture for the BC-2.03.003 out-of-vault rejection tests.

It does NOT contain a real file to ingest. Instead, bats tests that exercise the
out-of-vault rejection path use paths like the following as test inputs:

  /etc/passwd                          — system directory; always hard-blocked
  /tmp/outside-vault-file.md           — outside vault root; no allowlist entry
  ../../outside-vault/escape.md        — dot-dot traversal that readlink -f resolves
                                         to a path outside the vault root

The test fixture itself lives inside the vault (tests/fixtures/) so it can be
tracked in git. The out-of-vault paths used in bats tests are constructed at
test runtime using mktemp or hardcoded system paths — they are never tracked
as actual files in this repository.

Reference: BC-2.03.003 EC-001 (symlink inside vault resolving outside vault)
           BC-2.03.003 invariant 2 (system directories always blocked)
           STORY-019 AC-009, AC-010, AC-011, AC-012
